Difficult.requirements: Specialized tools, workshop, 4-6 components (up to 2 advanced)

recipes.name: Spine Lash Whip
recipes.effect: Light melee whip weapon. Damage 1, type: Slash. Grants +1 reach for disarming enemies. Can also be used to climb or swing across gaps. Durability 5; can be repaired with bone splinters and leather.

recipes.name: Crystal Lens Goggles
recipes.effect: Wearable optics. Grants +2 to Awareness checks involving distance, darkness, or arcane detection. Reduces visual impairment from smoke or dust. Durability 3; repairable with glass panes.

recipes.name: Reinforced Travel Pack
recipes.effect: Increases Encumberance by +5. Items inside are protected from crushing or minor impacts. Can attach additional gear using ropes or straps. Durability 10; repairable with cloth and rope.

recipes.name: Arc-Powered Kukri
recipes.effect: Light Melee weapon. Damage 1, type: Slash, +1 accuracy. On hit, deals minor arcane burn (1 magic damage). Durability 8; recharges arc energy with exposure to ambient magic.

recipes.name: Bone-Linked Bracers
recipes.effect: Armor for forearms. Reduces incoming Blunt damage by 1. Can store kinetic energy from 2 hits to release as a 1 unit knockback once per scene. Durability 12; repairable with bones and wire.

recipes.name: Everflow Flask
recipes.effect: Automatically refills one drink of water per hour. Costs 1 durability per use; durable up to 5 refills per day before needing maintenance.

recipes.name: Weighted Counterbalance
recipes.effect: Reduces effort needed to lift heavy loads. Provides +2 effective Might when lifting, holding, or restraining objects. Durability 10; components are reusable.

recipes.name: Smoke Diffuser Lantern
recipes.effect: Emits a low cloud of obscuring smoke that lightly blinds enemies in a 1 unit radius for 2 rounds. Useful for escapes or stealth. Durability 6; refill powder every 3 uses.

recipes.name: Arcane Gear Compressor
recipes.effect: Can crush, bind, or refine materials using arcane pressure. Doubles effectiveness of crafting checks involving compression or shaping. Durability 10; requires arc crystals to maintain output.

recipes.name: Scout Hover Drone
recipes.effect: Small autonomous flying drone. Can scout ahead, relay visual info, and mark enemies. Movement speed 3 units/round. Battery/durability 5; recharges with ambient arcane energy.

recipes.name: Mechanical Sentry Spider
recipes.effect: Small autonomous combat drone. Attacks nearby enemies with small Piercing appendages (Damage 2, type: Pierce). Can climb walls and ceilings. Durability 8; repairs with metal wire and arcane residue.

recipes.name: Alchemical Courier Bot
recipes.effect: Autonomous delivery unit. Can carry and dispense liquids or powders, open small doors, and avoid obstacles. Movement speed 2 units/round. Durability 12; refill liquids as needed, repairs require arcane sigil.

recipes.name: Ironjaw Dagger
recipes.effect: Light melee weapon. Damage 2, type: Pierce. +1 accuracy on attacks from behind. Durability 5; repairable with metal plate.

recipes.name: Reinforced Shoulder Pads
recipes.effect: Armor for shoulders. Reduces incoming Blunt damage by 2. Adds +1 to body-based checks involving lifting or pushing. Durability 8; repairable with metal plates.

recipes.name: Stormcaster Gloves
recipes.effect: Wearable gloves. Adds +1 to Lightning damage dealt by touch and grants minor lightning shock on melee attacks (1 damage, Lightning). Durability 6; recharge with ambient magic.

recipes.name: Traveler’s Cloak
recipes.effect: Wearable cloak. Grants +1 to Finesse and resistance to minor environmental hazards. Durability 6; repairable with cloth.

recipes.name: Bone Fang Greaves
recipes.effect: Leg armor. Reduces Slash damage by 2. Grants +1 movement speed bonus on natural terrain. Durability 10; repairable with bones and wire.

recipes.name: Arcane Focus Amulet
recipes.effect: Wearable. Increases arcane spell accuracy by +2. Can store 1 cantrip for quick release (oppertunity attack). Durability 5; recharges with ambient magic.

recipes.name: Water Sprout Canister
recipes.effect: Dispenses small amounts of water. Refill 15 uses/day. Costs 1 durability per use; repairable with glass tube.

recipes.name: Gear-Assisted Pulley
recipes.effect: Provides mechanical advantage for lifting. Doubles Encumberance.

recipes.name: Smoke Bomb Launcher
recipes.effect: Launches smoke bombs to obscure vision in a 2 unit radius (Range 4 Units). Durability 6; refill powder every 3 uses.

recipes.name: Arc-Powered Grinder
recipes.effect: Automates grinding or refining materials. Doubles crafting efficiency for applicable tasks. Durability 12; requires arcane crystals to recharge.

recipes.name: Thunderstrike Warhammer
recipes.effect: Heavy Melee weapon. Damage 2, type: Blunt, +1 accuracy. Deals bonus lightning damage (1).

recipes.name: Glass Prism Blade
recipes.effect: Medium Melee weapon. Damage 2, type: Slash. Can refract light to blind an adjacent enemy once per scene. Durability 8; repairable with glass panes.

recipes.name: Solar-Powered Lantern
recipes.effect: Emits light during darkness 3 hours per 1 durability. Recharges in daylight. Durability 6; no additional fuel needed.

recipes.name: Arcane Mining Drill
recipes.effect: Mechanically drills rock or ore, 3 units mined per Durability. Doubles extraction speed. Durability 12; arcane core recharges daily.

recipes.name: Clockwork Spy Rat
recipes.effect: Small autonomous scout. Can squeeze into tight spaces, gather information, and relay signals. Movement speed 3 units/round. Durability 6; repairs with wire and arcane residue.

recipes.name: Arc-Shield Gauntlets
recipes.effect: Wearable gauntlets. Grants +1 to Spirit and Fortitude.

recipes.name: Sharpened Stick
recipes.effect: Light melee weapon. Damage 1, type: Pierce. Can be used for hunting or self-defense. Durability 3; easily replaced in the field.

recipes.name: Stone Sling
recipes.effect: Light Finesse weapon. Range 3. Damage 1, type: Blunt. Useful for hunting or distraction. Durability 5; can replace stones as ammo.

recipes.name: Leather Wrist Wraps
recipes.effect: Wearable. Provides minor protection for wrists, +2 Encumberance.

recipes.name: Simple Backpack
recipes.effect: Increases Encumberance by +3. Can store small tools or provisions.

recipes.name: Wooden Shield
recipes.effect: Basic shield. Reduces incoming damage by 1 (all physical types). Can block minor attacks. Durability 6; repairable with wood and leather.

recipes.name: Glass Magnifier
recipes.effect: Provides minor visual enhancement for reading small text or examining objects.

recipes.name: Stone Hammer
recipes.effect: Light melee weapon. Damage 2, type: Blunt. Can be used for simple construction or breaking objects. Durability 5; easily repaired with wood and stone.

recipes.name: Basic Hunting Bow
recipes.effect: Light Firearm weapon. Range 4. Damage 2, type: Pierce. Requires arrows or sharpened sticks as ammo. Durability 6; repairable with wood and rope.

recipes.name: Iron-Tipped Spear
recipes.effect: Medium Melee or Medium Finesse weapon. Damage 3, type: Pierce. Versatile for combat and hunting. Durability 6; repairable with wood and metal.

recipes.name: Cloth Facewrap
recipes.effect: Wearable. Provides minor protection against dust, smoke, or sand. Can be soaked to filter liquids. Durability 4; repairable with cloth.

recipes.name: Wooden Practice Sword
recipes.effect: Improvised Melee weapon. Damage 1, type: Slash. Ideal for practice without risk of serious injury. Durability 5; easily replaced or repaired.

recipes.name: Leather Pouch
recipes.effect: Small container. Increases Encumberance by +2. Protects small items from dust or minor damage.

recipes.name: Basic Torch
recipes.effect: Provides light in dark areas. Burns for 1 hour. Damage 1, type: fire if used as improvised weapon. Durability 1 per use; consumable.

recipes.name: Handheld Compass
recipes.effect: Navigational tool. Grants +1 to navigation checks. Durable for light field use.

recipes.name: Leather Knee Pads
recipes.effect: Wearable. Improves stability on rough terrain (Entering or exiting no longer costs double movement).

recipes.name: Stone Throwing Axe
recipes.effect: Light Finesse weapon. Damage 2, type: Cleave. Can also be used for chopping small wood. Durability 5; repairable with stone and wood.

recipes.name: Basic Leather Belt
recipes.effect: Wearable. Holds tools or small pouches. +1 to Encumberance.

recipes.name: Wooden Staff
recipes.effect: Light melee weapon. Damage 1, type: Blunt. Can double as walking stick. Durability 5; repairable with wood.

recipes.name: Cloth Bandages
recipes.effect: Medical aid. Can be used to clear 3 Bleed Stacks. Single-use.

recipes.name: Flint-Tipped Dagger
recipes.effect: Light melee weapon. Damage 1, type: Pierce. Durable for field use.

recipes.name: Reinforced Leather Boots
recipes.effect: Wearable. Adds +1 movement speed on rough terrain.

recipes.name: Steel Shortsword
recipes.effect: Medium Melee weapon. Damage 2, type: Slash. +1 Damage to targets bellow half Health. Durability 8; repairable with metal and wood.

recipes.name: Arcane Focusing Ring
recipes.effect: Wearable. Grants +2 spell accuracy and stores 1 level 1 spell for release. Durability 5; repair with Arcane Crystal

recipes.name: Bone Edge Bracers
recipes.effect: Armor for forearms. Reduces Slash damage by 2. Grants +1 to grappling.

recipes.name: Arc-Powered Lantern
recipes.effect: Provides light in darkness. Can emit a flash to distract enemies once per scene. Durability 6; recharges with ambient magic.

recipes.name: Steam Pressure Pump
recipes.effect: Generates pressurized steam for machinery or traps. Can double output of mechanical devices. Durability 12; refill water daily.

recipes.name: Leather Satchel
recipes.effect: Small storage. Increases Encumberance by +4.

recipes.name: Crystal-Focused Staff
recipes.effect: Melee weapon or Arcane focus. Damage 2, type: Blunt. +2 accuracy to Spell attacks. Durability 7; recharges with ambient magic.

recipes.name: Bone-Plated Helm
recipes.effect: Head armor. Reduces incoming Cleave damage by 2. Durability 10; repairable with bones and wire.

recipes.name: Portable Grinding Wheel
recipes.effect: Grinds and sharpens tools or weapons. Doubles crafting speed for edge work. Durability 8; recharges with ambient magic.

recipes.name: Clockwork Spy Beetle
recipes.effect: Small scout. Can crawl into tight spaces, record info, and relay signals. Movement speed 3 units/round. Durability 6; repairable with wire and arcane residue.

recipes.name: Arc-Powered Crossbow
recipes.effect: Heavy Firearm weapon. Range 6, Damage 4, type: Pierce, +1 accuracy. Can discharge minor arcane bolt (1 magic damage) once per reload. Durability 8; recharges with ambient magic.

recipes.name: Stone Mallet
recipes.effect: Medium Melee weapon. Damage 2, type: Blunt. Useful for simple construction or breaking objects. Durability 5; repairable with wood and stone.

recipes.name: Arcane Workbench
recipes.effect: Station for crafting complex magical items. Grants +2 to all arcane crafting checks. Durability 12; requires arcane crystals to maintain functionality.

recipes.name: Guardian Drone
recipes.effect: Autonomous combat drone. Melee attack Damage 4, type: Slash; can guard an area. Movement speed 3 units/round. Durability 12; repairs require metal and arcane residue.

recipes.name: Stone Sling Pouch
recipes.effect: Small pouch for carrying sling stones. Improves reload speed. Durability 5; repairable with cloth and rope.

recipes.name: Basic Hood
recipes.effect: Wearable. Provides minor protection from weather and concealment. Durability 3; repairable with cloth.

recipes.name: Rope Ladder
recipes.effect: Portable ladder for climbing vertical surfaces (length 8 units). Durability 6; repairable with rope and wood.

recipes.name: Hunting Bow
recipes.effect: Medium Firearm weapon. Range 5. Damage 2, type: Pierce. Durability 6; repairable with wood and rope.

recipes.name: Steel Hatchet
recipes.effect: Medium Melee weapon. Damage 3, type: Cleave. Can chop wood and deal damage. Durability 7; repairable with metal and wood.

recipes.name: Crystal Lens Monocle
recipes.effect: Wearable. +2 Awareness bonus for inspecting details or arcane phenomena.

recipes.name: Bone Spiked Shield
recipes.effect: Armor. Reduces incoming damage by 2, can deal damage when bashing (1, type: Blunt). Durability 10; repairable with bone and metal.
